violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Store raw ground beef in refrigerator below/away from lettuce and milk in refrigerator.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers need detail cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Recommend storing pizza boxes etc. away from unprotected sink drain lines. Store Single service items off floor in dry storage area. Invert food to-go clamshells.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Acoustic style ceiling tiles in kitchen area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Wall around cooking equipment has discoloration and grease build up. Ceiling tiles stained in areas from water damage.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Operator currently assessing roof leaks.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
